item.title: Gateway port 18789 hardcoded in 23+ locations across 12 files
item.intent: Gateway port has a single source of truth. No literal 18789 appears outside src/config/defaults.ts. Changing the default port requires editing one line.
item.description: The Gateway port 18789 is hardcoded as a literal in at least 23 places across 12 files including src/build/launcher/preflight.ts:20, src/operate/doctor/checks.ts:589, and others. There is no single source of truth for this value. Steps: (1) grep codebase for 18789 to enumerate all instances; (2) define GATEWAY_DEFAULT_PORT = 18789 constant in src/config/defaults.ts (create file if absent) and export it; (3) replace all literal 18789 references with the constant import; (4) run full test suite to confirm no regression. Note: the port is configurable in openclaw.json — this change normalizes the fallback value, not the config surface. Scope: grep + search-replace across ~12 files, no logic change.
